TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pakistan, title = Pakistan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pakistan} }

S.FORM: Pakistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 30 00 N, 70 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 796,095 sq km (maki' tay 36ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 770,875 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 25,220 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 201,995,540. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 35.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 62.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Islamabad. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 14 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mamnoon Hussain, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Pakistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 30 00 N, 70 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 796,095 sq km (maki' tay 36ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 770,875 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 25,220 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 201,995,540. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 35.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 62.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Islamabad. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 14 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mamnoon Hussain, aring ryax 9 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: pakis~…ētan ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a is~…ēlamaő≤a*. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mamnoon ńßus~…ēs~…ēain, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
